item.title: Issue #2709 created
item.description:
Entity "language" was referenced but not declared.

It would be helpful if all XML documents were self-contained or used proper references. For example, expressions.xml references entities which are declared/imported nowhere in the document itself:

Entity "language" was referenced but not declared.

Can this be achieved one way or the other, or what other ways exist, apart from regular gradle calls, to avoid ending up with invalid document structures (caused by checks that stop validating the document after the first error)?
